senses.gloss: elative degree of جَيِّد (jayyid):; better; best
elative degree of جَيِّد (jayyid):; more liberal, more generous; most liberal, most generous
elative degree of جَيِّد (jayyid):; more excellent; most excellent

etymology.text: Elative of جَيِّد (jayyid, “good; liberal, generous; excellent”).
